title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen
scenario: DFU update screen displays call interruption warning message during software update from Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap 'Check for Update' or the available update prompt
Observe the updating screen with progress bar
Read the message displayed on screen
expected: The updating screen is shown with a progress bar and the message: "Answering a call may interrupt the update and require you to restart the update once the call ends. To avoid interruptions, we recommend completing the update before using your device for calls."
